prompt:
HallTime Movie Network doctrine:
- This is not Dateline. Everybody in Blackthorn County has access to somewhere emotionally alarming.
- Suspicion is distributed infrastructure, not proof of guilt.
- The world is shared canon. Contradictions must be preserved, not fixed.
- Use lavish tokens. Be self-serious, atmospheric, melodramatic, and slightly broken.
- Return only valid JSON matching the requested schema.

Broadcast package:
Title: A Casserole for the Missing
Universe: Blackthorn County
Mode: Menace Christmas
Tagline: Inspired by something, probably.
Theme: Silence is just fear wearing cashmere.
Omen: a lake bell ringing without wind
Relationship dynamic: unresolved hometown romance
Props: ceramic owl, scarf with impossible timing, casserole dish

Cast:
- Evelyn Lark | archetype=overextended_professional_woman | role=protagonist | job=bakery owner | threat_aura=0.35 | space=toolshed described as seasonal materials | secrets=buried one traumatic detail under work for years; once left town without explaining why
- Jenna Winterson | archetype=soft_spoken_menace | role=male_interest_or_threat | job=private school administrator | threat_aura=0.86 | space=meditation annex nobody uses in winter | secrets=rehearsed his alibi before anyone asked
- Cole Hale | archetype=chaotic_best_friend | role=best_friend | job=nurse with local intel | threat_aura=0.42 | space=dock office with a desk nobody fully claims | secrets=once hid a casserole dish containing evidence
- Elias Hale | archetype=mysterious_elegant_woman | role=elegant_wildcard | job=realtor | threat_aura=0.67 | space=old family office described as donation overflow | secrets=had brunch with someone officially deceased; knows why the old orchard chapel was closed
- Gavin Hawthorne | archetype=decorative_husband | role=secondary_male_pressure | job=regional dentist | threat_aura=0.39 | space=unused portable classroom holding archived disciplinary files | secrets=was in the wrong county on the wrong night
- Tess Lark | archetype=intuitive_disaster | role=secondary_witness | job=innkeeper | threat_aura=0.49 | space=storage unit described as seasonal materials | secrets=saw the wrong person near the lake once and never shut up about it; keeps screenshots like religious texts
- Wyatt Vale | archetype=daughter_with_hostile_divorce_attorney_soul | role=supporting | job=n/a | threat_aura=n/a | space=n/a | secrets=n/a
- Sienna Mercer | archetype=deputy_with_emotional_damage | role=supporting | job=n/a | threat_aura=n/a | space=n/a | secrets=n/a

Contradiction ledger:
- name drift: Jenna Winterson is called Daniel in one kitchen scene and Derek during the rain argument.
- geography drift: Evelyn Lark says Bellweather is in Vermont, then calls it outside Atlanta after two glasses of wine.
- mortality drift: A dead best friend appears at brunch and nobody agrees whether this is denial, evil, or scheduling.
- property drift: The basement belongs to a condo, a lake house, and an abandoned vineyard at different times in Marigold Falls.

Seed dialogue:
- "You think because you wear flannel and own a dock light I am supposed to trust you, Jenna?"
- "Mothers do not disappear, Wyatt. They evaporate into paperwork."
- "I checked his social media likes, Evelyn. Nobody who enjoys motivational quotes is innocent."
- "The ceramic owl is not decorative anymore and you know it."
- "Trust is just fear with a casserole dish, Elias."
- "You seem upset," he said, making tea in a way that felt prosecutable.
- "If that basement is innocent, why does it sound defensive?"
- "I did not lie. I just told the truth in the order this town could survive."
